# 💫 About Me

- 🎓 B.Tech Student at IIIT Ranchi
- 💻 Full Stack Developer specializing in MERN & Next.js
- 🤖 Passionate about AI Agents, RAG & LLM Applications
- 🧩 Passionate about Data Structures & Algorithms
- 🚀 Love building products that solve real-world problems
- 💡 Currently building products that combine AI and modern web technologies to solve real-world problems.
